indication: BOSULIF is a kinase inhibitor indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with chronic phase Ph+ chronic myelogenous leukemia (CML), newly-diagnosed or resistant or intolerant to prior therapy.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to bosutinib for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 1 year of age and older with chronic phase Philadelphia chromosome-positive (Ph+) chronic myelogenous leukemia (CML), newly-diagnosed or resistant or intolerant to prior therapy.

document.name: Bosulif (bosutinib) [package insert]. FDA.
